177: ### Callback System
178: 
179: ```rust
180: // Register a callback for BeforeGet events
181: data_object.register_callback(EventType::new("BeforeGet"), |obj, params| {
182:     println!("BeforeGet callback triggered!");
183:     // Access parameters if needed
184: });
185: 
186: // Register a callback for AfterSet events
187: data_object.register_callback(EventType::new("AfterSet"), |obj, params| {
188:     println!("AfterSet callback triggered!");
189: });
190: 
191: // Register a custom event callback
192: data_object.register_callback(EventType::new("validation"), |obj, params| {
193:     println!("Validation callback triggered!");
194: });
195: ```
196: 
197: ### Attribute Management
198: 
199: ```rust
200: // Get all attribute names
201: let names = data_object.get_attribute_names();
202: 
203: // Get raw attribute data
204: if let Some(attr) = data_object.get_attribute("price") {
205:     println!("Value: {}", attr.to_string());
206:     println!("Type: {:?}", attr.value_type);
207:     println!("Parameters: {:?}", attr.value_type_parameters);
208:     println!("Is float: {}", attr.is::<f64>());
209:     println!("Type ID: {:?}", attr.type_id());
210: }
211: 
212: // Get raw values in original type
213: let raw_value: Option<i32> = data_object.get_raw_value("age");
214: 
215: // Remove an attribute
216: let removed = data_object.remove_attribute("name");
217: ```
